MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to Extend Jurisdiction of the Arbitrators is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 4/1/2004. Order signed. Court ordered the Order to Show Cause re: Arbitration re-set to 5/6/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212.
